label: Invariant Vacuum
description: A world with zero invariants has no constitution. Any behavior is permitted. Governance is empty.

causal_translation.trigger_text: The world has zero declared invariants.
causal_translation.rule_text: Invariants are the constitution. Without them, there are no non-negotiable truths. The AI can say or do anything.
causal_translation.shift_text: Governance collapses to empty constraint space. The world is ungoverned.
causal_translation.effect_text: World integrity reduced to 15% of baseline. Invariants: UNENFORCEABLE.
